destinations.evidence: The nodebuilder installs a post-execution validator that verifies short async blocks using parent state and a header-derived EVM environment for commitment re-simulation.
The verifier rejects invalid async commitments using parent-state AsyncJobTracker checks, wallet checks, executor lookup, and EVM re-simulation parity.

equivalence_argument: The local nodebuilder no longer uses the older new_with_async_validation constructor shape. The equivalent behavior is installed as an engine tree post-execution validator: it passes the transaction pool/provider-owned parent state plus an EVM environment derived from EthEvmConfig::evm_env(parent_header) into verify_short_async_block_with_simulators, which rejects invalid async commitments.
notes: Mapped to the current nodebuilder verification hook rather than the older BlockVerifier constructor name.
rationale: The commit message says async commitment validation is wired into block verification, and the diff replaces BlockVerifier::new(pool) with new_with_async_validation(pool.clone(), ctx.provider().clone(), evm_env_factory) while adding the required ConfigureEvm/alloy-consensus dependency. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: The node's block verification path must construct BlockVerifier via new_with_async_validation using the transaction pool, the node state provider, and an EVM environment factory derived from EthEvmConfig::evm_env(header), so async commitment validation has access to both state and header-specific EVM environment.
suggested_falsification_tests: Instantiate the node executor wiring with a test provider and EVM config, submit or verify a block containing an async commitment that requires state/header-specific validation, and assert verification invokes the async validation path and rejects an invalid commitment that would have passed with the plain BlockVerifier::new(pool) constructor.
summary: Nodebuilder validates async commitments through the post-execution short-async verifier and header-derived EVM re-simulation.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Build a block containing an async commitment whose original transaction re-simulates to a different precompile/input under the parent-header EVM env and assert the post-execution validator returns InvalidAsyncCommitment.
title: Block verifier validates async commitments
